inputs.title: Add workflow stage agent override UI
inputs.description: Expose per-step agent overrides in Settings with validation against enabled tools and persistence through the existing stage-agents store.

context.acceptance: Operators can override a step agent, see the effective routing, and clear overrides.

rubric.criterion: Plan names affected surfaces, API routes, and rollback path.
Adds or updates tests covering override set, clear, and effective routing.

provenance.source: Derived from multi-surface code-feature deliveries in settings and routing.
provenance.notes: Pattern-synthesized from representative completed runs; no single source task id archived.
